samples.question: How many model kits have I worked on or bought?
samples.gold: I have worked on or bought five model kits. The scales of the models are: Revell F-15 Eagle (scale not mentioned), Tamiya 1/48 scale Spitfire Mk.V, 1/16 scale German Tiger I tank, 1/72 scale B-29 bomber, and 1/24 scale '69 Camaro.

openai/gpt-5.1.label: WRONG

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6.label: WRONG
anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6.reasoning: The gold answer states five model kits, but the AI answered 6, which is incorrect.
